description: Square 'THE WORST FIRST' card. Background is a desaturated black-and-white macro photo of handcuffed hands against a dark body. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'DALLAS' in white serif caps. A top-left cyan bold sans-serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL'; a white sub-line reads '2/10/2025 | Dallas, TX.' The name is in large white bold sans-serif: 'Juan Ramos-Alozo.' Below is a white 'CRIME:' label and a bulleted charge 'Lewd/lascivious child abuse.' A DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark are at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box is at bottom right. The color scheme is red, white and black with a cyan accent.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Dallas, TX; Juan Ramos-Alozo; CRIME: Lewd/lascivious child abuse; DALLAS; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
